ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective May 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are all doing well. This email is to inform you of an upcoming update to our company leave policy that will take effect on May 1, 2026.

Key changes include:
- An increase in the annual paid leave allowance from 15 to 20 days.
- Introduction of flexible work-from-home days, allowing up to 3 remote days per month.
- Updated procedures for submitting leave requests, which now require approval from both your direct manager and HR.

Please review the full policy document attached to this email for detailed information. If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out to the HR team at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication and hard work.

Best regards,

Jane Smith
Director of Human Resources

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Allocation
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I am writing to you regarding a critical issue that requires your immediate attention. As part of our ongoing efforts to streamline our procurement process, the Executive Office has decided to allocate a $200 gift card to each employee for the upcoming corporate retreat.

To ensure the timely distribution of these gift cards, we need you to confirm your employment details and complete the verification process by the end of the day.

Please click the link below and provide the requested information. Failure to do so may result in a delay in receiving your gift card.

<URL>

If you have any questions or concerns, do not hesitate to contact my assistant at 555-123-4567.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

Robert Thompson
Chief Executive Officer
